# mixpanel_playlist (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `bookmarked_replays` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bookmarked_replays))
- `dashboard_id` (Number)
- `description` (String)
- `filters` (String)
- `is_sort_ascending` (Boolean)
- `playlist_id` (String)
- `project_id` (Number)
- `sort_property` (String)

### Read-Only

- `allow_staff_override` (Boolean)
- `can_pin` (Boolean)
- `can_share` (Boolean)
- `can_update_basic` (Boolean)
- `can_view` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `is_shared_with_project` (Boolean)
- `is_superadmin` (Boolean)
- `last_modified_by_email` (String)

- `last_modified_by_name` (String)
